cleaned_text: 1. chartered accountant (ca) role summary a chartered accountant is responsible for managing accounting, auditing, taxation, and financial advisory services while ensuring compliance with statutory and regulatory requirements. key responsibilities prepare and review financial statements as per applicable accounting standards manage direct and indirect tax compliance (income tax, gst, tds) conduct audits and provide assurance on financial records advise management on financial planning, budgeting, and cost control ensure compliance with companies act, income tax act, and gst laws support business decision-making through financial analysis skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant (icai) strong knowledge of accounting standards, taxation, and audit analytical and problem-solving skills proficiency in accounting software and excel 2. practicing chartered accountant role summary a practicing ca provides professional services independently or through a firm, offering audit, taxation, compliance, and advisory services to multiple clients. key responsibilities handle statutory, tax, and internal audits for clients file income tax and gst returns for individuals and businesses provide business, financial, and compliance advisory services represent clients before tax authorities and regulators manage client relationships and ensure service quality stay updated with regulatory and legal changes skills qualifications ca qualification with certificate of practice (cop) client handling and communication skills strong knowledge of laws and regulations business development and advisory capability 3. audit manager role summary the audit manager leads audit engagements, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and risk mitigation in financial reporting. key responsibilities plan and manage statutory, internal, and special audits supervise audit teams and review audit work papers identify financial and operational risks ensure compliance with auditing standards and laws prepare audit reports and present findings to management coordinate with clients and senior leadership skills qualifications qualified ca strong audit and risk assessment expertise leadership and team management skills knowledge of auditing standards and regulatory frameworks 4. tax manager role summary the tax manager oversees direct and indirect tax planning, compliance, and litigation support to minimize tax risk and ensure regulatory adherence. key responsibilities manage income tax, gst, and other statutory tax filings develop tax planning strategies to optimize tax liability handle tax assessments, audits, and notices monitor changes in tax laws and ensure compliance coordinate with consultants and tax authorities maintain accurate tax documentation and reports skills qualifications ca qualification with specialization in taxation strong understanding of tax laws and procedures analytical and strategic thinking attention to detail and compliance focus 5. assurance manager role summary the assurance manager provides independent assurance on financial and operational processes to enhance reliability and stakeholder confidence. key responsibilities manage assurance engagements and client relationships evaluate internal controls and compliance frameworks review financial statements and disclosures ensure adherence to assurance and auditing standards identify control gaps and recommend improvements prepare assurance reports for stakeholders skills qualifications qualified ca strong understanding of assurance standards risk assessment and analytical skills excellent reporting and communication skills 6. accounting compliance manager role summary responsible for managing end-to-end accounting operations and ensuring statutory and regulatory compliance. key responsibilities oversee accounting processes and monthly closures ensure compliance with companies act, gst, income tax, and other laws prepare financial statements and mis reports coordinate with auditors and regulators maintain accounting controls and documentation lead compliance audits and reviews skills qualifications ca qualification strong accounting and compliance knowledge experience with erp accounting systems process management and coordination skills 7. risk compliance manager role summary the risk compliance manager identifies, assesses, and mitigates financial and regulatory risks within the organization. key responsibilities develop and implement risk management frameworks monitor regulatory compliance across functions conduct compliance audits and risk assessments report risk exposure to senior management ensure internal controls and governance standards support regulatory inspections and audits skills qualifications qualified ca knowledge of risk management and compliance frameworks strong analytical and governance skills stakeholder management capability 8. financial reporting manager role summary responsible for accurate, timely, and compliant financial reporting in line with statutory and accounting standards. key responsibilities prepare financial statements as per ind as ifrs ensure accurate consolidation and disclosures coordinate with auditors during audits maintain reporting calendars and compliance timelines analyze financial performance and trends support management reporting and decision-making skills qualifications ca qualification strong financial reporting and accounting standards knowledge high attention to detail advanced excel and reporting tools proficiency 9. statutory auditor role summary a statutory auditor examines financial statements to provide an independent opinion on their accuracy and legal compliance. key responsibilities conduct statutory audits under applicable laws verify financial records and supporting documents assess compliance with accounting standards and regulations identify misstatements and control weaknesses prepare audit reports and certifications communicate audit findings to stakeholders skills qualifications qualified ca in-depth auditing and accounting knowledge strong professional judgment ethical and independent mindset 10. internal auditor role summary the internal auditor evaluates internal controls, processes, and risk management to improve operational efficiency and governance. key responsibilities conduct internal audits across departments evaluate internal control effectiveness identify operational and financial risks recommend process improvements prepare audit reports and follow-up actions support management in strengthening controls skills qualifications ca qualification strong internal audit and process review skills analytical and investigative mindset good communication and reporting skills 11. concurrent auditor role summary the concurrent auditor performs real-time audits, primarily in banks and financial institutions, to ensure ongoing compliance and accuracy. key responsibilities review daily transactions and banking operations ensure adherence to rbi and internal guidelines detect irregularities and fraud risks report exceptions on a timely basis support regulatory inspections and audits maintain detailed audit documentation skills qualifications qualified ca knowledge of banking operations and rbi norms high attention to detail strong reporting and observation skills 12. forensic auditor role summary a forensic auditor investigates financial frauds, disputes, and irregularities using accounting, auditing, and investigative techniques. key responsibilities investigate financial frauds and misconduct analyze complex financial data and transactions collect and document audit evidence prepare forensic reports for legal proceedings support litigation and regulatory investigations coordinate with legal and enforcement agencies skills qualifications ca qualification expertise in forensic accounting and investigation strong analytical and investigative skills knowledge of legal and regulatory processes finance accounts roles 13. finance manager role summary the finance manager is responsible for managing the organization s financial planning, accounting operations, reporting, and compliance to support business objectives. key responsibilities oversee day-to-day finance and accounting operations prepare budgets, forecasts, and variance analysis ensure accurate monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports manage statutory compliance (gst, income tax, tds, roc) coordinate with auditors, bankers, and consultants support management with financial analysis and decision support skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant strong knowledge of accounting, taxation, and reporting experience with erp systems and mis reporting analytical and communication skills 14. senior finance manager role summary the senior finance manager leads finance strategy execution, complex reporting, and team management while partnering with senior leadership. key responsibilities lead finance team and oversee financial operations drive budgeting, forecasting, and long-term financial planning review financial statements and management reports monitor cash flow, working capital, and cost optimization ensure regulatory and statutory compliance act as a key business partner to senior management skills qualifications ca with significant post-qualification experience strong leadership and stakeholder management skills advanced financial analysis and strategic planning expertise 15. head of finance role summary the head of finance is responsible for the overall financial health, governance, and financial strategy of the organization. key responsibilities define and implement financial strategy aligned with business goals oversee accounting, finance, taxation, treasury, and compliance lead budgeting, forecasting, and performance management ensure strong internal controls and governance frameworks support strategic initiatives such as expansions, investments, and funding report financial performance to top management and board skills qualifications qualified ca strong strategic, leadership, and decision-making capabilities deep understanding of corporate finance and compliance 16. financial controller (fc) role summary the financial controller ensures accurate financial reporting, robust internal controls, and compliance with accounting standards and laws. key responsibilities oversee accounting records and financial statements ensure compliance with ind as ifrs and statutory requirements manage audits and liaison with statutory auditors implement and monitor internal financial controls oversee closing processes and reporting timelines support management with financial insights and risk analysis skills qualifications ca with strong financial reporting background expertise in accounting standards and controls high attention to detail and governance focus 17. group financial controller role summary the group financial controller manages consolidated financial reporting and controls across multiple entities or group companies. key responsibilities oversee group-level accounting and consolidation prepare consolidated financial statements ensure consistency in accounting policies across entities manage group audits and regulatory reporting strengthen group-wide internal controls and governance support group leadership with financial insights skills qualifications ca with consolidation and group reporting experience strong knowledge of ind as ifrs ability to manage multi-entity structures 18. accounts manager role summary the accounts manager manages daily accounting operations, ensuring accurate records and timely reporting. key responsibilities supervise accounting entries and ledger maintenance manage accounts payable and receivable ensure timely bank reconciliations support month-end and year-end closures assist in statutory compliance and audits maintain accounting documentation and controls skills qualifications ca with hands-on accounting experience strong accounting principles knowledge erp and excel proficiency 19. senior accounts manager role summary the senior accounts manager oversees accounting teams and complex accounting issues while ensuring compliance and accuracy. key responsibilities lead accounting team and review accounting records handle complex accounting transactions ensure compliance with accounting standards and laws coordinate with auditors and tax consultants prepare mis and management reports strengthen accounting controls and processes skills qualifications qualified ca strong technical accounting and team leadership skills 20. chief accountant role summary the chief accountant is responsible for maintaining accurate financial records and ensuring compliance with accounting standards and internal policies. key responsibilities oversee general ledger and financial records ensure compliance with accounting standards and company policies supervise accounting staff and processes support financial reporting and audits maintain internal controls over accounting activities assist senior management in financial reviews skills qualifications ca qualification strong accounting and control background leadership cxo roles 21. chief financial officer (cfo) role summary the cfo is responsible for the overall financial strategy, performance, governance, and long- term financial sustainability of the organization. key responsibilities lead financial strategy and planning oversee finance, accounting, taxation, treasury, and compliance manage capital structure, funding, and investor relations drive profitability, cost management, and cash flow optimization support m a, strategic investments, and growth initiatives present financial performance to board and stakeholders skills qualifications qualified ca with extensive leadership experience strong strategic, financial, and business acumen excellent stakeholder and board-level communication skills 22. deputy cfo role summary the deputy cfo supports the cfo in managing finance functions and ensures smooth execution of financial strategies. key responsibilities assist cfo in financial planning and strategy execution oversee financial operations and reporting manage finance teams and cross-functional coordination ensure compliance and internal controls step in as acting cfo when required support board and investor reporting skills qualifications ca with senior leadership experience strong operational and strategic finance skills 23. finance director role summary the finance director focuses on governance, compliance, and financial leadership at the board level. key responsibilities provide strategic financial guidance to the board ensure corporate governance and regulatory compliance oversee financial reporting and audits evaluate major investments and strategic decisions strengthen risk management and control frameworks represent finance function at executive level skills qualifications qualified ca board-level finance and governance experience 24. executive director finance role summary the executive director finance oversees finance operations at the highest executive level and contributes to organizational strategy. key responsibilities lead finance function across the organization drive financial strategy and performance management oversee compliance, reporting, and governance support corporate restructuring, m a, and growth plans work closely with board and top leadership skills qualifications ca with extensive executive experience strong leadership and strategic thinking 25. vice president finance role summary the vp finance bridges strategic planning and operational execution, supporting organizational growth and financial discipline. key responsibilities lead financial planning and performance management oversee finance teams and reporting processes support fundraising, investor relations, and strategic initiatives ensure robust financial controls and compliance partner with business heads for financial decision-making skills qualifications ca with senior management experience strong analytical, leadership, and communication skills 26. chief accounting officer (cao) role summary the cao is responsible for all accounting policies, financial reporting accuracy, and compliance with accounting standards. key responsibilities define and maintain accounting policies and standards ensure accurate financial reporting and disclosures oversee accounting operations and teams manage statutory and internal audits ensure compliance with ind as ifrs gaap support cfo and board on accounting matters skills qualifications qualified ca deep expertise in accounting standards and reporting strong governance and control orientation taxation roles (direct indirect tax) 27. tax consultant role summary the tax consultant provides advisory and compliance support in direct and indirect taxes, ensuring clients or the organization remain compliant while optimizing tax positions. key responsibilities prepare and review income tax and gst returns handle tax computations for individuals and businesses assist in tax planning and advisory assignments support tax audits, assessments, and notices maintain tax documentation and working papers stay updated with changes in tax laws and regulations skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant good understanding of income tax and gst laws strong analytical and documentation skills client communication and advisory ability 28. senior tax consultant role summary the senior tax consultant manages complex tax matters, supervises junior consultants, and provides advanced tax advisory support. key responsibilities review tax computations and filings handle complex tax planning and advisory cases manage tax assessments, appeals, and notices supervise and mentor junior tax team members coordinate with clients and tax authorities ensure high-quality tax deliverables skills qualifications ca with strong post-qualification tax experience in-depth knowledge of tax laws and interpretations leadership and client-handling skills 29. direct tax manager role summary the direct tax manager oversees direct tax compliance, planning, and litigation support to manage tax risks effectively. key responsibilities manage corporate income tax compliance and filings develop and implement tax planning strategies handle tax assessments, scrutiny, and appeals review advance tax and withholding tax calculations monitor changes in tax laws and assess impact coordinate with external tax advisors and auditors skills qualifications qualified ca strong expertise in income tax act and corporate taxation strategic tax planning and risk management skills 30. indirect tax manager role summary the indirect tax manager ensures compliance with indirect tax laws and optimizes tax processes and structures. key responsibilities oversee gst compliance and return filings manage gst audits, notices, and assessments advise on gst implications of transactions ensure correct tax classification and credit utilization monitor changes in indirect tax laws coordinate with tax authorities and consultants skills qualifications ca with specialization in indirect taxation in-depth gst and indirect tax knowledge strong compliance and advisory skills 31. gst consultant role summary the gst consultant provides compliance, advisory, and representation services related to goods and services tax. key responsibilities prepare and file gst returns and reconciliations advise on gst applicability and classification handle gst notices, audits, and assessments assist in gst registrations and amendments reconcile gst data with books and returns ensure compliance with gst laws and timelines skills qualifications chartered accountant strong gst law and compliance knowledge attention to detail and analytical skills 32. gst manager role summary the gst manager leads gst compliance and advisory functions while managing teams and complex gst matters. key responsibilities oversee end-to-end gst compliance review gst returns, reconciliations, and reports handle complex gst advisory and structuring manage gst audits and litigation support lead and mentor gst compliance teams liaise with tax authorities and senior management skills qualifications qualified ca advanced expertise in gst and indirect taxes team leadership and stakeholder management skills 33. international tax consultant role summary the international tax consultant advises on cross-border taxation, double taxation avoidance, and global tax compliance. key responsibilities advise on international tax structures and transactions analyze dtaa, pe exposure, and withholding taxes support cross-border tax compliance and reporting assist in international tax audits and assessments coordinate with global tax teams and advisors monitor global tax law developments skills qualifications ca with international tax exposure strong knowledge of dtaa, oecd guidelines, beps analytical and research-oriented mindset 34. transfer pricing consultant role summary the transfer pricing consultant ensures compliance with transfer pricing regulations for related-party transactions. key responsibilities prepare transfer pricing documentation and reports conduct benchmarking and economic analysis advise on pricing policies for intercompany transactions handle transfer pricing audits and disputes coordinate with international teams and advisors monitor changes in transfer pricing regulations skills qualifications qualified ca strong understanding of transfer pricing laws and methods data analysis and documentation skills 35. corporate tax advisor role summary the corporate tax advisor provides strategic tax advice to optimize tax structures and ensure compliance. key responsibilities advise on corporate tax structuring and planning support mergers, acquisitions, and restructuring from a tax perspective evaluate tax risks and compliance gaps provide opinions on complex tax issues coordinate with internal teams and external advisors support management in strategic tax decisions skills qualifications ca with strong corporate tax advisory experience strategic thinking and risk assessment skills strong business understanding 36. tax litigation manager role summary the tax litigation manager manages tax disputes, appeals, and legal proceedings before tax authorities and tribunals. key responsibilities handle tax litigation and dispute resolution prepare submissions, appeals, and legal documentation represent organization before tax authorities and tribunals coordinate with legal counsels and consultants track litigation status and risk exposure advise management on litigation strategy and outcomes skills qualifications qualified ca strong experience in tax litigation and representation legal drafting and analytical skills audit assurance roles 37. statutory audit manager role summary the statutory audit manager leads statutory audit engagements and ensures that financial statements comply with applicable laws and accounting standards. key responsibilities plan and manage statutory audits under companies act and other laws supervise audit teams and review audit working papers ensure compliance with ind as ifrs and auditing standards identify audit risks and control weaknesses finalize audit reports and audit opinions liaise with clients, management, and auditors skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant strong statutory audit and reporting experience leadership and client-handling skills 38. internal audit manager role summary the internal audit manager evaluates internal controls, risk management, and governance processes to improve operational efficiency. key responsibilities develop and execute internal audit plans lead internal audit assignments across functions evaluate internal controls and risk management systems identify process gaps and recommend improvements prepare internal audit reports and follow-up actions coordinate with management and audit committees skills qualifications ca with strong internal audit experience knowledge of risk-based auditing strong analytical and communication skills 39. external auditor role summary the external auditor provides independent assurance on the accuracy and fairness of financial statements. key responsibilities conduct statutory and external audits verify financial records and supporting documents test internal controls and compliance identify misstatements and audit risks prepare audit documentation and reports communicate audit findings to stakeholders skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant strong accounting and auditing standards knowledge professional skepticism and integrity 40. concurrent auditor (banking) role summary the concurrent auditor performs real-time audits of banking operations to ensure compliance with rbi guidelines and internal policies. key responsibilities review daily banking transactions and operations ensure adherence to rbi norms and bank policies identify irregularities, frauds, and control lapses report exceptions on a timely basis support rbi inspections and statutory audits maintain detailed audit documentation skills qualifications qualified ca strong knowledge of banking operations and rbi regulations high attention to detail 41. systems auditor role summary the systems auditor evaluates it systems, controls, and processes to ensure data integrity, security, and operational effectiveness. key responsibilities audit it systems and application controls review access controls, data security, and system integrity evaluate it general controls and automated processes assess system risks and recommend improvements coordinate with it teams and management prepare system audit reports skills qualifications ca with systems audit experience knowledge of it controls and erp systems analytical and technical mindset 42. sox auditor role summary the sox auditor ensures compliance with the sarbanes-oxley act by evaluating internal controls over financial reporting. key responsibilities test internal controls under sox framework document control design and operating effectiveness identify control deficiencies and remediation plans coordinate with process owners and management support internal and external sox audits maintain sox documentation and compliance reports skills qualifications qualified ca strong understanding of sox and icfr process documentation and testing expertise 43. process auditor role summary the process auditor reviews business processes to identify inefficiencies, risks, and control gaps. key responsibilities conduct process audits across departments map processes and identify improvement areas evaluate operational controls and sop adherence recommend process enhancements and efficiencies prepare process audit reports follow up on implementation of recommendations skills qualifications ca with process audit experience strong process analysis and documentation skills 44. compliance auditor role summary the compliance auditor ensures adherence to regulatory, statutory, and internal compliance requirements. key responsibilities conduct compliance audits and reviews verify adherence to laws, regulations, and internal policies identify compliance risks and violations prepare compliance audit reports support regulatory inspections and audits advise management on compliance improvements skills qualifications qualified ca strong regulatory and compliance knowledge attention to detail and governance focus 45. quality review auditor role summary the quality review auditor evaluates audit quality, methodologies, and compliance with professional standards. key responsibilities review audit files for quality and standard compliance assess adherence to auditing standards and firm policies identify gaps in audit execution and documentation provide feedback and recommendations to audit teams support audit quality improvement initiatives assist in regulatory and peer reviews skills qualifications ca with strong audit and quality review experience in-depth knowledge of auditing standards strong evaluation and reporting skills forensic, risk compliance roles 46. forensic accountant role summary the forensic accountant investigates financial irregularities, frauds, and disputes by analyzing financial records and evidence. key responsibilities analyze financial data to detect fraud and irregularities conduct forensic accounting investigations examine transactions, books, and supporting documents prepare forensic reports and documentation support legal proceedings and regulatory investigations coordinate with legal teams and enforcement agencies skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant strong forensic accounting and analytical skills attention to detail and investigative mindset 47. forensic audit manager role summary the forensic audit manager leads forensic investigations and manages teams handling complex fraud cases. key responsibilities lead forensic audit assignments and investigations design investigation approach and scope supervise forensic audit teams and review findings identify fraud risks and control weaknesses prepare forensic reports for management and legal use liaise with legal counsels, regulators, and senior management skills qualifications ca with strong forensic audit experience leadership and investigation management skills knowledge of legal and regulatory processes 48. fraud risk analyst role summary the fraud risk analyst identifies, assesses, and mitigates fraud risks within business operations. key responsibilities analyze transactions and data for fraud indicators conduct fraud risk assessments and monitoring develop fraud detection and prevention frameworks investigate suspected fraud cases prepare fraud risk reports and dashboards recommend fraud control and prevention measures skills qualifications chartered accountant strong data analysis and risk assessment skills knowledge of fraud prevention techniques 49. risk advisory consultant role summary the risk advisory consultant provides advisory services on risk management, internal controls, and governance frameworks. key responsibilities assess business, financial, and operational risks evaluate internal control systems and processes advise clients on risk mitigation strategies support risk transformation and compliance projects prepare risk assessment reports and presentations coordinate with clients and stakeholders skills qualifications ca with risk advisory experience strong analytical and consulting skills knowledge of enterprise risk frameworks 50. enterprise risk manager (erm) role summary the enterprise risk manager designs and implements enterprise-wide risk management frameworks to support organizational objectives. key responsibilities develop and maintain erm frameworks identify and assess strategic, operational, and financial risks monitor risk exposure and mitigation plans report risk metrics to senior management and board integrate risk management into business strategy support regulatory and governance requirements skills qualifications qualified ca strong knowledge of erm frameworks (coso, iso) strategic thinking and governance skills 51. compliance officer role summary the compliance officer ensures adherence to regulatory, statutory, and internal compliance requirements. key responsibilities monitor compliance with laws and regulations develop and update compliance policies and procedures conduct compliance audits and reviews handle regulatory filings and disclosures support regulatory inspections and audits train employees on compliance requirements skills qualifications chartered accountant strong regulatory and compliance knowledge attention to detail and governance orientation 52. corporate governance manager role summary the corporate governance manager ensures effective governance practices, board compliance, and ethical standards within the organization. key responsibilities ensure compliance with corporate governance requirements support board and committee operations monitor adherence to companies act and sebi regulations develop governance policies and frameworks coordinate board reporting and disclosures advise management on governance best practices skills qualifications ca with strong governance and compliance experience knowledge of corporate laws and regulations strong coordination and communication skills 53. aml kyc specialist role summary the aml kyc specialist ensures compliance with anti-money laundering and know-your- customer regulations. key responsibilities conduct customer due diligence and kyc reviews monitor transactions for aml red flags investigate suspicious transactions and activities file regulatory reports (str, ctr) ensure compliance with rbi and aml regulations support aml audits and regulatory inspections skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant knowledge of aml kyc laws and frameworks strong analytical and investigative skills banking financial services roles 54. banking accountant role summary the banking accountant manages accounting, reconciliation, and regulatory reporting for banking and financial operations. key responsibilities maintain accurate accounting records for banking transactions perform daily bank reconciliations and ledger reviews prepare financial statements and regulatory reports ensure compliance with rbi guidelines and banking regulations support statutory, internal, and concurrent audits coordinate with branches and operations teams skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant strong knowledge of banking accounting and regulations attention to detail and compliance focus 55. credit analyst role summary the credit analyst evaluates creditworthiness of borrowers and supports lending decisions through financial and risk analysis. key responsibilities analyze financial statements and cash flows of borrowers assess credit risk and repayment capacity prepare credit appraisal and sanction notes monitor loan accounts and covenant compliance conduct industry and borrower risk analysis support credit committees and management skills qualifications ca with strong financial analysis skills knowledge of lending products and credit risk analytical and decision-support capability 56. loan audit officer role summary the loan audit officer audits loan portfolios to ensure compliance with lending policies, rbi norms, and internal controls. key responsibilities audit loan documentation and sanction processes verify compliance with rbi and internal credit policies review asset classification and provisioning identify irregularities and control gaps prepare audit reports and follow-up actions support regulatory inspections and reviews skills qualifications qualified ca knowledge of banking audits and loan operations strong observation and reporting skills 57. treasury manager role summary the treasury manager manages liquidity, investments, and financial risk to optimize returns and ensure funding stability. key responsibilities manage cash flow, liquidity, and funding requirements oversee investments, borrowings, and interest rate risk monitor forex exposure and hedging strategies ensure compliance with rbi and treasury regulations prepare treasury mis and risk reports coordinate with banks, investors, and regulators skills qualifications ca with treasury and financial markets exposure strong understanding of risk management and derivatives analytical and strategic thinking skills 58. investment analyst role summary the investment analyst evaluates investment opportunities and supports portfolio decisions through research and financial modeling. key responsibilities analyze financial performance of companies and sectors build financial models and valuation reports conduct market, industry, and risk analysis support investment decisions and recommendations track portfolio performance and market trends prepare investment presentations and reports skills qualifications qualified ca strong financial modeling and valuation skills knowledge of capital markets and investments 59. fund accountant role summary the fund accountant manages accounting and reporting for investment funds, ensuring accuracy and regulatory compliance. key responsibilities maintain books of accounts for mutual funds aifs calculate nav and fund performance metrics prepare investor reports and regulatory filings coordinate with custodians, fund managers, and auditors ensure compliance with sebi and regulatory requirements support fund audits and reviews skills qualifications ca with fund accounting experience knowledge of fund structures and regulations strong accounting and reconciliation skills 60. portfolio manager role summary the portfolio manager manages investment portfolios to achieve optimal returns within defined risk parameters. key responsibilities develop and implement portfolio investment strategies monitor portfolio performance and risk exposure make buy sell hold decisions based on analysis ensure compliance with investment guidelines communicate portfolio performance to stakeholders adjust strategies based on market conditions skills qualifications ca with strong investment and portfolio management experience deep understanding of markets and risk management strategic and decision-making ability 61. relationship manager (corporate banking) role summary the relationship manager manages corporate client relationships and drives banking solutions and business growth. key responsibilities manage relationships with corporate clients identify and cross-sell banking products and services coordinate credit appraisal and loan processing monitor client accounts and credit exposure ensure customer satisfaction and retention act as liaison between clients and internal teams skills qualifications ca with strong finance and client-handling skills knowledge of corporate banking products communication and relationship-building skills 62. risk analyst (banking nbfc) role summary the risk analyst identifies, measures, and monitors financial and operational risks in banking and nbfc environments. key responsibilities analyze credit, market, and operational risks develop risk models and monitoring tools track portfolio risk and early warning indicators prepare risk dashboards and reports support stress testing and risk assessments ensure compliance with rbi risk management norms skills qualifications qualified ca strong risk analysis and data interpretation skills knowledge of banking and nbfc regulations investment, valuation advisory roles 63. valuation analyst role summary the valuation analyst supports valuation engagements by analyzing financial data and applying valuation methodologies for businesses, assets, and securities. key responsibilities perform business and asset valuations build financial models and forecasts apply valuation techniques (dcf, comparable, precedent transactions) analyze financial statements and market data prepare valuation reports and presentations support transaction and advisory the business valuation consultant provides independent valuation opinions for strategic, regulatory, and transaction purposes. key responsibilities lead valuation engagements for businesses and shares determine valuation approach and assumptions review financial projections and business plans prepare valuation reports for regulatory and transaction use support m a, restructuring, and fundraising statements and performance trends prepare budgets, forecasts, and variance analysis build financial models and scenario analysis support strategic planning and investment evaluation prepare mis and management reports assist in cost control and profitability analysis skills qualifications qualified ca strong financial analysis and modeling skills advanced excel and reporting proficiency 66. equity research analyst role summary the equity research analyst analyzes listed companies and industries to provide investment recommendations. key responsibilities conduct company and industry research analyze financial statements and earnings performance build valuation and forecasting models prepare research reports and investment recommendations track market trends and corporate actions present insights to investors and fund managers skills qualifications ca with strong capital markets knowledge financial modeling and valuation expertise strong research and communication skills 67. m a consultant role summary the m a consultant advises clients on mergers, acquisitions, divestments, and restructuring transactions. key responsibilities support m a transactions end-to-end perform advice on capital raising, restructuring, and growth initiatives. key responsibilities advise on fundraising, debt, and equity transactions evaluate strategic investment and expansion opportunities support financial restructuring and turnaround projects prepare financial models and investor presentations liaise with investors, banks, and stakeholders support board-level financial decision-making analyst supports investment banking transactions including m a, capital raising, and advisory mandates. key responsibilities build financial models and valuation analyses prepare pitch books and transaction presentations support deal execution and documentation conduct industry and company research assist senior bankers in client engagements support regulatory and transaction compliance skills qualifications ca with strong financial modeling skills knowledge of capital markets and deal processes high attention to detail and work discipline 71. transaction advisory manager role summary the transaction advisory manager leads transaction advisory engagements and manages teams supporting complex deals. key responsibilities lead financial due diligence and advisory assignments manage transaction teams and timelines review valuation, diligence, and deal outputs advise clients on deal risks and structure coordinate with legal, tax, and regulatory advisors support senior leadership in transaction execution skills qualifications ca with strong transaction advisory experience leadership and client management skills deep understanding of deal lifecycle government psu roles 72. government auditor role summary the government auditor examines public accounts to ensure proper utilization of government funds and compliance with financial rules and regulations. key responsibilities conduct audits of government departments and public bodies verify expenditure against sanctioned budgets and grants ensure compliance with government financial rules and manuals identify irregularities, inefficiencies, and misuse of funds prepare audit reports and observations for authorities support legislative and parliamentary audit processes skills qualifications qualified chartered accountant strong knowledge of government accounting and audit procedures high integrity and attention to detail 73. accounts officer (psu) role summary the accounts officer manages accounting operations, financial records, and statutory compliance in a public sector undertaking. key responsibilities maintain books of accounts and financial records prepare financial statements as per government and psu norms ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulations manage payments, receipts, and reconciliations coordinate with statutory and cag auditors support budget preparation and financial reporting skills qualifications ca qualification knowledge of psu accounting and government financial rules erp and financial systems proficiency 74. finance officer (psu) role summary the finance officer oversees financial planning, budgeting, and financial control in a psu. key responsibilities prepare budgets, forecasts, and financial plans monitor expenditure and financial performance support investment, procurement, and contract decisions ensure financial discipline and cost control prepare mis and management reports advise management on financial matters skills qualifications qualified ca strong financial planning and analysis skills knowledge of psu finance and regulations 75. internal auditor government bodies role summary the internal auditor evaluates internal controls and processes in government departments to enhance accountability and efficiency. key responsibilities conduct internal audits of government departments and schemes review compliance with financial rules and procedures assess internal controls and risk management identify control gaps and process improvements prepare internal audit reports and recommendations follow up on audit observations and corrective actions skills qualifications chartered accountant knowledge of government auditing and internal control systems strong analytical and reporting skills 76. comptroller auditor general (through exams) role summary officers under the comptroller auditor general (cag) audit government accounts and public sector entities to ensure transparency and accountability. key responsibilities audit accounts of central and state governments review public expenditure, revenue, and receipts conduct performance and compliance audits report audit findings to parliament and legislatures support constitutional audit functions ensure public financial accountability skills qualifications ca qualification (through relevant competitive exams and services) strong understanding of public finance and governance high ethical standards and independence 77. gst officer consultant role summary the gst officer consultant ensures compliance with gst laws and supports assessment, audit, and advisory functions. key responsibilities assess gst returns and filings conduct gst audits and inspections handle gst assessments, notices, and disputes advise on gst compliance and interpretation support enforcement and revenue functions ensure adherence to gst laws and procedures skills qualifications qualified ca strong knowledge of gst laws and procedures analytical and regulatory interpretation skills 78. income tax advisor role summary the income tax advisor provides advisory and compliance support related to income tax laws for individuals, businesses, or government bodies. key responsibilities advise on income tax compliance and planning prepare and review income tax returns support assessments, appeals, and representations interpret tax laws and circulars assist in litigation and dispute resolution maintain accurate tax documentation skills qualifications chartered accountant strong expertise in income tax act and procedures advisory and representation skills 79. international accountant role overview an international accountant manages accounting operations for multinational businesses, ensuring compliance with international accounting standards, cross-border transactions, and multi-currency reporting. key responsibilities prepare and maintain financial statements for international entities handle multi-currency accounting and foreign exchange adjustments ensure compliance with ifrs and local country accounting regulations coordinate with overseas subsidiaries and finance teams manage intercompany transactions and reconciliations support international audits and regulatory reporting monitor international tax implications and transfer pricing basics skills qualifications chartered accountant (ca) or equivalent strong knowledge of ifrs experience with global erp systems (sap, oracle, netsuite) excellent communication and cross-cultural coordination skills career scope global finance lead regional controller international finance manager 80. global finance manager role overview a global finance manager oversees financial strategy, reporting, and performance across multiple countries and business units. key responsibilities manage global budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning consolidate financial statements of global entities analyze financial performance across regions ensure compliance with international accounting and tax laws oversee treasury, cash flow, and global funding structures lead and mentor international finance teams support strategic decisions, expansion, and investments skills qualifications ca with 8 15 years of global finance experience expertise in consolidation and international compliance strong leadership and stakeholder management skills career scope chief financial officer (global) regional finance director 81. ifrs consultant role overview an ifrs consultant advises organizations on adoption, implementation, and interpretation of international financial reporting standards. key responsibilities guide companies in ifrs transition and implementation interpret complex ifrs standards and provide advisory notes convert financial statements from local gaap to ifrs support audits, disclosures, and regulatory filings train internal finance teams on ifrs updates assist in ifrs impact assessments and policy
